# Bug: --count with --shout repeats one greeting too few

> Bug ID: HELLO-BUG-001
> Severity: minor
> Status: 🔴 reported
> Reported: 2026-06-06

## Description

Reported via BUG_REPORT.md: `hello Alice --count 5 --shout` is expected to print HELLO, ALICE! five times. Investigate the count loop and the shout/count interaction; add a regression guard either way.
